UG-23  MAXIMUM ALLOWABLE STRESS VALUES. (a) The maximum allowable stress values to be used in the design formulas of UG-27 and UG-28 shall be the values given in the applicable material tables. For carbon and low alloy steels, stress values shall be as specified in UCS-23. For high alloy steels, see UHA-23. (b) At design temperatures where creep governs, the time-dependent allowable stress shall be used. (c) Joint efficiency factors from UW-12 shall be applied when applicable. The design loads used with these stress values shall be those established in accordance with UG-22. For vessels under external pressure, refer to UG-28.
